name: Awesome OpenClaw Skills Explorer

description: Search local providers and book IT support services with availability checks and confirmations.

description: Collaborative note-taking and documentation sharing for cross-functional teams.

description: Analyzes wind turbine blade inspection data to assess damage types and severity.

description: Interactive explorer for turbine inspection and analytics with zone-based summaries.

name: Sales Analytics
description: Analyze retail sales performance and forecast demand using seasonal models.

description: Developer toolkit for building and testing OpenClaw extensions and integrations.

name: Inspector CLI
description: Command-line utilities for inspection workflows, including report generation and validation.

name: Builder Pro
description: High-performance build orchestration and artifact management for mono-repos.

description: Browse and launch legacy skill definitions from archived catalogs.

name: Retail Insights

name: Arcade Game
description: Retro arcade gameplay with modern leaderboard and tournaments.
